page.title: About — Vernal Medicare | Local, Licensed Help in Uintah County
page.heading: About Vernal Medicare
page.description: I'm Rocco DeLuca, a local, licensed agent in Vernal, Utah. Simple help with Medicare, under-65 coverage, copay coverage, and life insurance—no pressure.
page.summary: I'm Rocco DeLuca, a local, licensed insurance agent based in Vernal. I help Uintah Basin residents choose Medicare Advantage, Medigap, Part D, under-65 Marketplace coverage, copay (fixed indemnity) plans, and life insurance — in plain English, at no extra cost, with year-round support.

meta.ogDescription: Local, face-to-face help choosing Medicare and health coverage that fits your needs and budget.

body.introHtml: I'm Rocco DeLuca, a local, licensed agent based in Vernal. My job is simple: help you choose coverage that fits your needs and budget—without the runaround.
body.noteHtml: There's no extra cost to you—agents are typically paid by the plan or carrier if you enroll.
togetherItemsHtml: Compare: simple, side-by-side options in plain English.
Enroll & support: we get it done right—and I'm here year-round.
body.localHtml: Plans perform differently by county. Because I live and work here, I know the local networks, pharmacies, and what actually works in the Basin. See Medicare plans in Vernal or more about working with a local agent.
body.carriersHtml: I work with multiple carriers (availability varies by county). We do not offer every plan available in your area. Any information I provide is limited to the plans I do offer. For info on all your options, visit Medicare.gov or call 1-800-MEDICARE (TTY: 711).
body.credentialsHtml: I’m a licensed Medicare insurance agent, and — like every agent who can offer Medicare Advantage and Part D — I complete the AHIP certification and each carrier’s training every year before I can talk plans with you. Here’s what stands behind the advice on this site:
credentialItemsHtml: My credentials & certifications — licensing, annual training, and compliance.
How we keep this site accurate — official sources, single-source annual figures, and review.
What clients say — reviews from local Medicare beneficiaries and their families.
body.talkHtml: Call or email for a friendly, no-pressure chat.
body.quoteText: "Coverage should be simple, local, and matched to you."
